name: Last Supplied Item Ageing
query:
SELECT
    Tab.`ItemCode:Link/Item:120`,
    Tab.`ItemName:Data:130`,
    Tab.`Description:Data:150`,
    Tab.`ItemGroup:Link/Item Group:120`,
    Tab.`Type`,
    Tab.`AvailableQty:Float:130`,
    Tab.`AgeinginDays:Int:130`,
    Tab.`LastSuppliedDate:Date:130`,
    Tab.`Customer:Link/Customer:130`,
    Tab.`LastCustomerName:Data:130`,
    Tab.`EngineerName:Data:130`,
    Tab.`LastPurchaseAge:Int:130`,
    Tab.`LastPurchasedDate:Date:130`,
    Tab.`LastPurchaseInvoiceNumber:Data:130`,
    Tab.`LastPurchaseRate:Currency:130`,
    Tab.`OpeningRate:Currency:130`
FROM (
    SELECT
        i.item_code AS `ItemCode:Link/Item:120`,
        i.item_name AS `ItemName:Data:130`,
        i.description AS `Description:Data:150`,
        i.item_group AS `ItemGroup:Link/Item Group:120`,
        (SELECT IFNULL(sle.qty_after_transaction, 0) FROM `tabStock Ledger Entry` sle WHERE sle.item_code = i.item_code AND sle.warehouse = %(warehouse)s ORDER BY sle.creation DESC LIMIT 1) AS `AvailableQty:Float:130`,
        (SELECT DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), si.posting_date) FROM `tabSales Invoice Item` sii INNER JOIN `tabSales Invoice` si ON si.name = sii.parent WHERE sii.item_code = i.item_code AND si.docstatus = 1 AND sii.warehouse = %(warehouse)s AND si.company = %(company)s ORDER BY si.creation DESC LIMIT 1) AS `AgeinginDays:Int:130`,
        (SELECT si.posting_date FROM `tabSales Invoice Item` sii INNER JOIN `tabSales Invoice` si ON si.name = sii.parent WHERE sii.item_code = i.item_code AND si.docstatus = 1 AND sii.warehouse = %(warehouse)s AND si.company = %(company)s ORDER BY si.creation DESC LIMIT 1) AS `LastSuppliedDate:Date:130`,
        (SELECT si.customer FROM `tabSales Invoice Item` sii INNER JOIN `tabSales Invoice` si ON si.name = sii.parent WHERE sii.item_code = i.item_code AND si.docstatus = 1 AND sii.warehouse = %(warehouse)s AND si.company = %(company)s ORDER BY si.creation DESC LIMIT 1) AS `Customer:Link/Customer:130`,
        (SELECT si.customer_name FROM `tabSales Invoice Item` sii INNER JOIN `tabSales Invoice` si ON si.name = sii.parent WHERE sii.item_code = i.item_code AND si.docstatus = 1 AND sii.warehouse = %(warehouse)s AND si.company = %(company)s ORDER BY si.creation DESC LIMIT 1) AS `LastCustomerName:Data:130`,
        (SELECT st.sales_person FROM `tabSales Invoice Item` sii INNER JOIN `tabSales Invoice` si ON si.name = sii.parent INNER JOIN 
    `tabSales Team` st ON si.name = st.parent WHERE sii.item_code = i.item_code AND si.docstatus = 1 AND sii.warehouse = %(warehouse)s AND si.company = %(company)s ORDER BY si.creation DESC LIMIT 1) AS `EngineerName:Data:130`,
    (SELECT DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), (SELECT sle.posting_date FROM `tabStock Ledger Entry` sle WHERE sle.item_code = i.item_code AND sle.warehouse = %(warehouse)s and sle.actual_qty >=0 and voucher_type not in ('Sales Invoice','Stock Reconciliation','Stock Entry') ORDER BY sle.creation DESC LIMIT 1)) 
        FROM `tabPurchase Invoice Item` sii INNER JOIN `tabPurchase Invoice` si ON si.name = sii.parent WHERE sii.item_code = i.item_code AND sii.warehouse = %(warehouse)s AND si.company = %(company)s ORDER BY si.creation DESC LIMIT 1) AS `LastPurchaseAge:Int:130`,
        (SELECT sle.posting_date FROM `tabStock Ledger Entry` sle WHERE sle.item_code = i.item_code AND sle.warehouse = %(warehouse)s and sle.actual_qty >=0 and voucher_type not in ('Sales Invoice','Stock Reconciliation','Stock Entry','Delivery Note') ORDER BY sle.creation DESC LIMIT 1) AS `LastPurchasedDate:Date:130`,
        (SELECT si.doc_no FROM `tabPurchase Invoice Item` sii INNER JOIN `tabPurchase Invoice` si ON si.name = sii.parent WHERE sii.item_code = i.item_code AND si.docstatus = 1 AND sii.warehouse = %(warehouse)s AND si.company = %(company)s ORDER BY si.creation DESC LIMIT 1) AS `LastPurchaseInvoiceNumber:Data:130`,
        i.last_purchase_rate AS `LastPurchaseRate:Currency:130`,
        (SELECT sri.valuation_rate FROM `tabStock Reconciliation Item` sri INNER JOIN `tabStock Reconciliation` sr ON sr.name = sri.parent WHERE sri.item_code = i.item_code AND sri.warehouse = %(warehouse)s AND sr.company = %(company)s) AS `OpeningRate:Currency:130`,
        (select WD.type from `tabItem` It inner join `tabWarehouse Details` WD on WD.parent = It.name where It.name = i.name and  WD.warehouse = %(warehouse)s ) as `Type`   

    FROM `tabItem` i
    WHERE i.disabled = 0
) AS Tab
WHERE Tab.`AvailableQty:Float:130` > 0;
